response.overview: # Synopsis Translation  The film depicts the life of a student named Fuad who dreams of becoming a badminton player. Fuad lives with his mother, father, and a younger sister, Munirah. Meanwhile, Shahizam is a student who has just moved from the city to a village. He begins to befriend Fuad. Shahizam gradually adapts to life in the village. Shahizam is proud of Fuad for having great ambitions despite his difficult circumstances. Unfortunately, Shahizam's good relationship with Fuad is not approved by Shahizam's mother. She scolds Fuad for befriending her son. A grieving Fuad then walks home. However, unexpectedly he is involved in an accident and dies. Shahizam is deeply saddened and promises to fulfill his best friend's dream. But will he succeed in achieving the late friend's dream?
response.title: Pinjamkan Aku Pelangi
